name: ACADIA REALTY TRUST
summary: Acadia Realty Trust (AKR) is a real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on acquiring, developing, and managing retail properties in supply-constrained, densely populated markets with high average household incomes and significant barriers to entry. The company operates through two segments: a core REIT portfolio of retail properties held via its Operating Partnership, and an Investment Management platform that manages private-equity-style real estate funds, earning asset management fees and Promote distributions.
